nta.declaration: clock cl; int temp; const int a = 2011; const int b = 2028; const int c = 2047; const int d = 2066; const int e = 2086; const int f = 2105; const int g = 2124; const int h = 2143; const int i = 2164; const int j = 2185; const int k = 2210; const int l = 2235; const int m = 2255; const int n = 2274; const int o = 2293; const int p = 2312; const int q = 2333; const int r = 2366;
